description: Create a survey in LimeSurvey titled 'IT Asset Audit 2025' to collect hardware inventory data. Within a question group named 'Hardware Details', create four questions: 'Asset Tag' (Short Free Text, Code: AssetTag) requiring the format 'IT-12345' via regular expression with the user tip 'Format: IT-12345'; 'MAC Address' (Short Free Text, Code: MacAddr) requiring standard MAC address format via regular expression with the user tip 'Format: XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX'; 'Purchase Year' (Numerical Input, Code: PurchYear); and 'Warranty Expiry Year' (Numerical Input, Code: WarrYear) with a validation equation ensuring it is greater than or equal to the Purchase Year and the user tip 'Warranty expiry cannot be before purchase year'. Log in with admin/Admin123!.
